title: 38% Upside To Black Knight Shareholders If Intercontinental Exchange Closes
text: Black Knight is being acquired by Intercontinental Exchange for $68 + 0.144 share. The market is very skeptical whether the deal will pass muster with regulators.

title: The Combination of Black Knight and Intercontinental Exchange Might Unravel. Here's Why.
text: Washington is skeptical of the transaction.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold Intercontinental (ICE) Stock
text: A compelling portfolio, expansive risk management services, strategic buyouts, solid balance sheet and effective capital deployment continue to drive Intercontinental Exchange (ICE).

title: ICE Announces a Unique Wealth Management Platform Integration with BNY Mellon | Pershing
text: ATLANTA & NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc., a leading global provider of data, technology and market infrastructure, and BNY Mellon | Pershing, a leading provider of clearing and custody solutions, announced today that the web-based version of the ICE Connect wealth management platform has been integrated into BNY Mellon | Pershing's clearing and custody platform NetX360+®. Davenport & Company, one of the oldest, employee-owned financial services firms in the U.S., is the first client to migrate over 250 advisors to the new integrated solution.

title: 3 Dividend Stocks With Wide Economic Moats
text: When investors are looking for long-term buy-and-hold investments, there are different angles to consider. Resilience during recessions, strong management, sound fundamentals, such as high margins and returns on capital, and healthy balance sheets are positives.
